✦ Latest Drop

Friends Edition

culinema
📍 Hawkins, Indiana
···
1,284 likes
culinema The most iconic dessert disaster in TV history — and we made it. 🫣Rachel's Trifle from Friends has layers of ladyfingers, raspberry jam, fresh custard, raspberries… and yes, beef sautéed with peas and onions. 🥩🫛

Because the pages stuck together, and honestly? We respect the commitment.

Whether you go full Rachel (brave) or swap the meat for chocolate brownies (smart), this is the ultimate Friends-themed party dessert that no one will forget. 🍮✨

Drop a 🥄 if you'd actually try the real version — and a 😅 if you'd go for the safe one.
#RachelsTrifle #FriendsTVRecipes #TrifleRecipe #FunnyFoodRecipes #PopCultureFood

✦ The Recipe

🥗 Rachel’s Trifle Recipe
The Stuck-Together Version

To get the authentic look, you must assemble the layers in a tall glass trifle bowl in this specific order:

As Joey would say: "What's not to like? Custard? Good. Jam? Good. Meat? Gooooood!"

1
Layer 1 The Traditional Start

Ladyfingers: A layer of ladyfinger biscuits (or sponge cake) at the very bottom.

Jam: A layer of seedless raspberry jam spread over the biscuits.

Custard: A thick layer of vanilla custard (made from scratch, according to Rachel).

02
Layer 2 The "Mistake" Layers

Raspberries: A layer of fresh raspberries.

Beef Sautéed with Peas and Onions: This is where the pages stuck together. Sauté ground beef with onions and peas, then spread it right over the fruit and custard.

03
Layer 3 The Topping

More Custard: Another layer of vanilla custard.

Bananas: Sliced bananas layered on top. Whipped Cream: A generous amount of whipped cream to cover everything

#RachelsTrifle #FriendsTVRecipes TrifleRecipe #FunnyFoodRecipes #PopCultureFood

✦ Post Strategy

Promo Blueprint

📍
Target Markets
Eastern Europe First
Poland, Romania, Hungary, Portugal — low CPM, high fandom culture, Netflix-heavy audiences. Skip UK/Germany for now; too expensive for this budget.
👥
Audience
18–34, Fandom + Food
Interests: Stranger Things, Netflix, Recipe videos, Desserts. Use OR targeting to maximize reach. 5–6€ demands width, not precision.
⏰
Best Timing (TR Time)
Tue/Wed 21:00 TR
That's 19:00–20:00 Central Europe — post-dinner scroll peak. Run the ad across 3–4 days, Reels format. Expect 2,000–4,500 impressions.

friends don't lie — and neither does good food 🧇
